most_interesting: The central question is not whether audio LLMs can process audio, but when native audio input creates value that transcript-only systems cannot recover.
most_useful: A public-safe dashboard can track papers, ideas, and experiments without mixing in confidential company context.
best_idea: Codec-as-LLM-interface evaluation: judge tokenizers by downstream usefulness, not only reconstruction.
best_paper_or_repo: Qwen-Audio and Low Frame-rate Speech Codec are the current deep-read anchors.
stop_thinking_about: Do not overbuild the system before it contains real reading decisions.
push_next_week: Write one memo on native-audio value beyond ASR and one table comparing codec/tokenizer papers.
research_map_updates: Initialized public-safe audio LLM map with big questions, gaps, useful problems, and seed papers.
